title: cyperus tribrachiatus
intro: Cyperus tribrachiatus, also known as three-bracted flatsedge, is a plant species in the sedge family that is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. It is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Cyperus tribrachiatus can be prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
